message.content:
@startuml
title Update PractitionerRole

skinparam backgroundColor white
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  LifeLineBorderColor #666666
  LifeLineBackgroundColor white
  ParticipantBorderColor #2f4f7f
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #6f97e6
  ActorBorderColor #333333
  ActorBackgroundColor #6f97e6
  ArrowColor #000000
  ArrowThickness 2
  MessageAlign left
}

actor "Integrating application user" as User
participant "Integrating application" as App
participant "<FHIR API> HPI" as API
database "HPI Practitioner Role database" as DB

User -> App : Update PractitionerRole\nusing\nhpi-practitionerrole-id
activate App

App -> API : PUT <Endpoint>/PractitionerRole/[hpi-practitionerrole-id]
activate API

API -> API : Validate[]

API -> DB : Request
activate DB
DB --> API
deactivate DB

API --> App : HTTP 200 reponse
deactivate API

App -> User
deactivate App

@enduml
